## Install / Upgrade

```bash
npm i -g oh-my-codebuddy-sisyphus@{{VERSION}}
```

> **Package naming note:** the repo, plugin, and commands are branded **oh-my-codebuddy**, but the published npm package name remains [`oh-my-codebuddy-sisyphus`](https://www.npmjs.com/package/oh-my-codebuddy-sisyphus).
